title: Products
subtitle: Explore D'auchy.Studio's AI solutions that support people from daily life to business

lingalink.name: LingaLink
lingalink.description: Online coaching service where AI provides automatic reviews for lessons. Offers personalized learning experiences and supports effective skill development.

edumate.name: EduMate
edumate.description: A service that allows you to review lessons and study collaboratively with friends, while also creating reports for parents. Deepen understanding through collaborative learning.

officebrain.name: OfficeBrain
officebrain.description: RAG system that enables file sharing within organizations with permission management. Achieves secure information sharing and improves business efficiency.

enterprisellm.name: Enterprise LLM
enterprisellm.description: All-in-one enterprise platform integrating project management, knowledge sharing, and AI assistants. Integrated solution that maximizes team potential.

baydsystem.name: Bayd-System
baydsystem.description: Music rehearsal studio management system. AI searches for optimal studios based on conditions, providing comprehensive support from booking to equipment management.

aigenone.name: AiGen-One
aigenone.description: An AI operations platform that turns frontline language into business systems and distributes managed AI features through an internal portal.
